title: The Eccentric Driver
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. He also pays a visit to his doctor.

title: How to Spend a Long Night
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. He also visits the sauna.

title: Beware of Borrowed Plumes
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. He also has a wanted criminal armed with a gun get into his taxi.

title: Tanaka's Revolution
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. Sometimes he drives in a little bit of a hurry.

title: Don't Call Me an Idol
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. Sometimes idols ride in his taxi, but don't worry; he's as tight-lipped as an authentic bartender.

title: Let Me Hear You Say, "What the Hell?"
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. Sometimes he's taken to a cabaret club in Shinjuku.

title: Trick or Treat
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. Sometimes weirdos pick fights with him in Shibuya on Halloween.

title: Bless You
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. Come to think of it, he's driven Goriki before.

title: The Hero's Melancholy
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. However, he's not very good at car chases.

title: We Have No Tomorrow
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. Sometimes he's threatened and attacked by passengers.

title: If We Could Go Back to That Day
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. Due to his profession, he's familiar with the parking lots around the city.

title: Not Enough
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city. Sometimes he helps rob a bank.

title: Where To?
overview: It's business as usual for privately-owned taxi driver Odokawa as he drives a variety of passengers around the city.
